description_long: This is a military-style helmet with an olive green, matte-finished shell and a robust, rounded profile. The helmet features integrated black ear protection on both sides, with attached communication equipment including a microphone boom and wiring. A large, dark-tinted visor is mounted at the front, capable of being flipped up or down, and a black strap system encircles the helmet for secure fastening. There is a rectangular patch or card tucked into the left side, possibly for identification or unit marking. The overall construction suggests durability and protection, suitable for tactical or aviation use in urban environments.
description: A rugged olive green military helmet with a flip-up dark visor, integrated ear protection, and attached communication gear.
description_view_0: Rear view showing the helmet's rounded shell, black strap, and a rectangular patch on the left side.
description_view_1: Left-side view highlighting the ear protection, communication microphone, and the patch detail.
description_view_2: Front view displaying the large dark visor, chin strap, and symmetrical ear protection.
description_view_3: Right-side view focusing on the ear protection, communication wiring, and the helmet's smooth curvature.
